plugins.name: flywheel
plugins.description: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code and Droid — define-goal, dispatch, loop-architect, and factory-doctor: turn plain-language wants into measurable goal contracts in a docs/goals queue, work the queue with isolated implementer agents, design autonomous loop contracts, and preflight the environment.

plugins.name: swiftui-ios
plugins.description: Ground AI-written SwiftUI in real production usage from iOS & iPadOS apps, plus skills (domain audits + write/modernize/scaffold): lookup/consensus/deprecation/recipes + domain audits via the swiftui-ctx CLI, slash commands, a review agent, and a deprecation hook.
